title: How The Richest Self-Made Woman In America Built Her Empire | Forbes - YouTube
text:
[Music]
I want to talk to you about building
this business so you've built ABC Supply
with Ken until 2007. right Ken was a
roofer when I met him and probably five
years after I knew Ken
we started doing government work many
nights with big prints laying all over
trying to determine what we're going to
bid to get one of those jobs
and they were they were large contracts
and it was it was an open bid process
and if you weren't if you were a little
bitter and you were really low you
worried a lot so we did that for quite a
long time we realized the the need in
the our industry the roofing industry
but the manufacturers each of them they
were the manufacturers of it but they
were also the distributor there was no
distribution chain Across the Nation so
there was little pockets of where the
products were manufactured and that's
you generally bought from the
manufacturer that was in your area
roofing contractors in the military they
would spec products that you couldn't
get in the areas where they were
building where they were asking you to
provide product and you just start
looking at the need and over the course
of five ten years we realized that there
needed to be a distribution chain to be
able to offer to the customer us the
contractor the selection of various
manufacturing products Across the Nation
and so we pursued that finally put
together a plan I remember it took us
like two years
to put together the plan and how do we
start Where Do We Begin to be a
distributor of roofing products
and so we we practiced on a wholesale
store that sold products for real estate
people just to see what it was like and
from there we decided we were ready a
couple years later and we opened up
store one for ABC Supply
with products that we brought in
shingles from different manufacturers we
built one and then we bought two and
then we started to grow but it was
always to carry those products that
would make it easy Across the Nation but
would also we would be giving that
contractor the respect that he needed so
we we did everything that we could to
make the contractor have what we hadn't
been provided for as contractors
[Music]
